results.title: The best AI dictation and speech-to-text software in 2026 | Product Hunt
results.content:
# The best AI dictation and speech-to-text software in 2026

AI voice input tools let you press a key, speak naturally, and instantly paste clean, structured text into any app. Most of them use a push-to-talk model (usually the Fn key) so you can trigger voice input anywhere without switching windows, opening a modal, or copying and pasting.

They’ve quietly become a new input layer for the computer: faster than typing, more natural than shortcuts, and flexible enough to drive workflows across writing, coding, email, and AI assistants.

Wispr Flow
Typeless
MacWhisper
superwhisper
TalkTastic
Monologue
Wispr Flow: Dictation That Works Everywhere
Promoted

## How we chose these products [...] ### Why we picked it

We've tested dozens of dictation tools, and WisprFlow stands out for one reason: it just works. Fast, accurate, and available everywhere you type—Mac, Windows, iOS. It adapts to your writing style, so the output sounds like you, not a robot. If you're already deep in AI-powered workflows (Cursor, Claude, ChatGPT), WisprFlow slots in perfectly as a voice front-end.

### Best for

Power users who want one voice layer across all their devices and apps.

### Watch out for

No offline mode. Free tier is limited—$12/mo for heavy use.

### Standout features

WisprFlow is the best speech-to-text software that I have used, and I use it every single day.

## Aqua Voice — Best for Long-Form Writing

Aqua Voice

Fast Voice Input for Mac and Windows

### Why we picked it [...] Willow Voice

Voice dictation that actually works

### Why we picked it

Willow Voice is built for the 80% of knowledge work that's just... responding to people. Emails, Slack, DMs. We picked it because it auto-formats and tones your message so it's basically ready to send. The iOS keyboard means you can dictate anywhere on your phone, not just inside an app.

### Best for

Anyone who spends their day in email, Slack, iMessage, or support tools.

### Watch out for

Best for short-form communication—not ideal for long-form writing.

### Standout features

In general, I would say every bug or feature request that you share with them is acted on very diligently and with speed.

## Ito — Best Open-Source Voice Assistant

Ito

VibeType anywhere with your voice (Open Source)

results.title: Wispr Flow: Speak naturally, write perfectly & 4x faster in every app | Product Hunt
results.content:
#### What needs improvement

An offline or privacy-first mode would be great, and lowering resource usage would make it even smoother for long sessions. An Android version would also unlock a huge user base.

#### vs Alternatives

Traditional speech-to-text tools and a few other AI dictation apps, but they felt either too basic or too isolated from real workflows. Wispr Flow stood out because it works everywhere and actually adapts to how you write. [...] #### What needs improvement

A more explicit offline or privacy-first mode would make it easier to recommend for sensitive work.

#### vs Alternatives

Aqua Voice

I considered Aqua Voice and a few other dictation tools but Wispr Flow feels more seamless because it keeps working across apps and preserves the shape of a thought instead of forcing me to rewrite everything after speaking.

Tereza Hurtová

#### What's great

I’ve dictated tens of thousands of words by now, and honestly, there is no going back to manual typing for me. It’s easily one of the best tools in my stack. [...] LIVE March 13th at 12:30pm PT

results.title: Voibe Reviews (2026) | Product Hunt
results.content:
#### vs Alternatives

Wispr Flow

Voibe does a great job, its fast , accurate and big value for money. The fact that its on the device locally means that my data is not used for training other models.

Raakesh Reddy

#### What's great

Tried Voibe and it’s surprisingly smooth. It lets me dictate anywhere on macOS without jumping between apps, and it runs locally which is a big plus for privacy. Feels lightweight, fast, and practical, especially when you want to get thoughts out quickly instead of typing everything. Nice option if you’re experimenting with voice-first workflows.

Sachin Goyal

#### What's great

It's usable on any patform, I love that it's accessible to anything (browser, IDE ..)

I love it's accuracy and speed.

Ayush Chaturvedi

#### What's great [...] Ayush Chaturvedi

#### What's great

Incredible product, its my daily driver now.. use it everywhere on my Mac for dictation.. thanks for building it 🙌 [...] Anietie Effiong

#### What's great

Voibe is the dictation tool I've been waiting for as an AI power user  
  
I've tried a bunch of dictation apps (Wispr Flow, superwhisper, even Apple's built-in), but Voibe stands out for how seamlessly it fits into AI-heavy workflows.

Being fully offline and private is huge for me, no worrying about sensitive prompts or code snippets going to the cloud. The speed is insane; transcription feels instant, and the deep integration with Cursor and VS Code is a game-changer. It actually resolves file/folder names correctly when I mention them in voice, which saves so much back-and-forth editing.
